review_items.title: Harness
review_items.rationale: Parent execution-governance concept tying request boundary, task contract, completion gate, authority, and verification together.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Task Contract
review_items.rationale: Explicit outcome, evidence, and constraint contract narrower than general planning strategy.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Request Boundary
review_items.rationale: Ingress identity, tenant scope, schema validity, and admission are product/security boundaries.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Completion Gate
review_items.rationale: Terminal acceptance authority is a concrete harness primitive.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Canonical Run Authority
review_items.rationale: Execution state authority differs from Source governance and candidate delivery.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Stopping Policy
review_items.rationale: Stop, wait, complete, fail, and cancel rules are reusable harness execution policy.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Goal Drift
review_items.rationale: Failure mode tied to Task Contract and steering should remain first-class.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Steering Control Plane
review_items.rationale: Human authority over intent, boundaries, evidence, and escalation is distinct from Source governance.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Headless Harness Service
review_items.rationale: UI-independent execution core is an implementation/product architecture concept.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Durable Thread State
review_items.rationale: Persistent interaction state across turns supports the Headless Harness Service.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Item Turn Thread Protocol
review_items.rationale: Typed item/turn/thread model is specific enough to warrant a canonical protocol concept.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized canonical adoption as a new harness execution-governance concept; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Harnessability
review_items.rationale: Keep the idea, but tighten the definition as a measurable quality attribute before adoption.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized adoption only after the canonical adoption PR narrows this item to a harness-specific definition; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Agent Loop
review_items.rationale: Approve only if edited to a harness-specific governed loop with distinct lifecycle semantics.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized adoption only after the canonical adoption PR narrows this item to a harness-specific definition; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Tool Calling
review_items.rationale: Prefer an edited concept such as Tool Call Proposal if the intended meaning is proposed external operations requiring authority.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized adoption only after the canonical adoption PR narrows this item to a harness-specific definition; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

review_items.title: Verification
review_items.rationale: Approve only if edited to a harness-specific verification primitive with acceptance authority boundaries.
review_items.provenance_note: Daniel authorized adoption only after the canonical adoption PR narrows this item to a harness-specific definition; use the existing decision-capture rationale as provenance guidance.

next_human_action: Human decisions are recorded. Next agent action is to create a canonical Source adoption PR that keeps Source PR #19 draft and does not merge it as-is.

human_authorization.authorization_text: 我同意採用建議決策：前 11 項 approve_new；後 4 項 edit；edit 項需在 adoption PR 中收窄為 harness-specific 定義後才可 canonicalize。
